content.en:
Mingya knew that Miao An was also one of her competitors, and there were only six places in the Second Dao Realm, which was too few.

But there is no way, the main object of cultivation of Taisu Palace is the genius in the Triple Dao Realm, and the cultivation of the Triple Dao Realm is only incidental.

With a little cultivation of the top-level Triple Supreme Dao Realm, it is expected to break through to the Quadruple Supreme Dao Realm, and it will not be difficult to become a Fifth Supreme Dao Realm in the future.

And the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm is the backbone of Taisu Palace, if you can cultivate a few Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms, it will be even better.

Any Sixfold Dao Realm is the top combat power of Taisu Palace.

"I've already arrived here, and if I change places, maybe other places will be taken over. "

Shen Ya thought.

Soon, she showed a grim look.

The competition for the place of the Double Dao Realm is too great, and Miao An is her competitor again, and she wants to eliminate Miao An.

Kill Miao'an, she can't do it, but if she kills these supreme realms under Miao'an's command.

At that time, Miao'an will have no help, so don't think about finding more material resources in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, which is equivalent to being completely eliminated.

Of course.

She wouldn't kill her directly, it would also cause heavy losses to the Supreme Dao Realm under her command, so it wouldn't be worth it.

"Normalize!"

Styx shouted.

"Lord Mingya!" a double supreme realm shrouded in black robes walked out and said respectfully to Shenya.

Mingya began to command: "Guiyi, your life-saving ability is very strong, and you can speed the supreme power, mother asked you to protect me, but now I need you to do something." "

"Lord Mingya, please command!" Gui Yi hurriedly said.

"Just before, we encountered a Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon, and that Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon caused us a lot of trouble, and also caused us to lose a Supreme Dao Realm. I want you to introduce that Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon into the Mountain Ghost Territory step by step, and cause trouble for Miao'an and them. "

The Supreme Dao Realm under Miao An's command was fighting against the Xuanlin Mountain Ghost under the Mountain Ghost Leader, which was already very difficult, and if they were mixed with a Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon, they would definitely suffer heavy losses.

Guiyi knew that this task was a bit dangerous, but he didn't say anything, and immediately said, "Yes, Lord Mingya!"

Immediately, he went to lead Dao Gulong.

And Shen Ya withdrew a little away with the other Supreme Dao Realms, so as not to touch the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon.

"Let's just watch the show!"

Styx muttered.

......

Time passes slowly.

Guiyi soon attracted the Ancient Dragon of the Supreme Dao and headed towards the mountain ghost leader.

But the strength of the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon is too strong, and in order to attract it, Guiyi must also touch it again and again, and naturally the injury is not light.

Of course, if he chose to escape, he could easily escape, but his purpose was to introduce the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon into the Mountain Ghost Realm.

Finally.

The Ancient Dragon of the Dao came to the Mountain Ghost Leader.

Mountain Ghost Collar.

Ye Tian and the others were still fighting with the ghosts of Xuanlin Mountain, he was the first to sense the arrival of the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon, and he also sensed another Supreme Dao Realm - Returning to One!

In an instant, he understood what was happening.

However, he didn't alert the many Supreme Dao realms.

After all, the other Supreme Dao Realms hadn't discovered it yet, and it would undoubtedly be very strange for him to be the first to find out.

But a few seconds later, the other Dao realms were discovered.

"The Ancient Dragon !!! the Path"

"Damn, who is that guy, he actually attracted the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon!"

"Oh no, it's completely troublesome now!"

These Dao realms panicked, and if they panicked, they would suddenly be unable to compete with these Xuanlin Mountain ghosts.

The other side.

Miao An also knew that the Ancient Dragon of the Supreme Dao was coming, and his face changed.

The strength of the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon is extremely strong, although it is not the Triple Supreme Dao Realm, but it is also at the top in the Dual Supreme Dao Realm, the key is that the physical body is extremely tough, and it is difficult to hurt the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon.

Even if all the Supreme Dao Realms were combined, they would not be able to kill the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon, but would suffer heavy losses.

When encountering the Ancient Dragon, there is only one way, and that is to escape.

But now, the Supreme Dao Realm under her command is fighting with the ghosts of Xuanlin Mountain, although they stopped the ghosts of Xuanlin Mountain, they were also stopped by the ghosts of Xuanlin Mountain, and they didn't have time to escape!

"I can't continue to look for the Supreme Ghost Stone!"

She immediately shuttled over.

Soon.

She saw the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon, and her face was extremely solemn.

"Withdraw!"

Miao An ordered.

As a result, these Dao realms fought and retreated.

Soon, a one-heavy Supreme Dao Realm was killed, and even with the two-pattern Supreme Dao armor, it was impossible to save his life.

It didn't take long for this group of Supreme Dao Realms to completely collapse and disperse.

Even if Miao An ordered them to unite, it was useless.

"Damn it!"

Miao An couldn't be furious.

She knew very well that there was a Supreme Dao Realm who had just attracted the Supreme Dao Ancient Dragon, and it was most likely her competitor's faction.

......

"It's safe!"

Ye Tian had already escaped from the mountain ghost collar and came to a strange place, and there was no other Dao realm around.

"This is a great opportunity, I have to copy the second copy body, so that I can get rid of Miao An and break through the Xuanlin Mountain Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

With his strength, even if it is very dangerous to go alone, he can copy his body again and again, even if he is killed, it doesn't matter.

If you get good things, you will make a lot of money!

Soon, he copied the second replica body.

Immediately afterwards, his second copy body began to copy the third copy body, and after the copy came out, he stayed away from here and explored the way step by step, so as not to meet Miao An later, which would be exposed.

It didn't take long for him to receive a summons from Miao An and rendezvous at one place.

Subsequently.

He immediately rushed to the place that Myaan had said.

After a period of time, a person came back to the Dao Realm.

They knew very well that if they were alone in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, they would definitely die, even if they were the top of the Dual Dao Realm, if they encountered a Dao Strange Thing, they would be instantaneous.

If you want to live, you still have to follow Miao'an.

Miao An saw that a Dao Realm had returned, and his mood was still not good.

She knew very well that this time she was afraid that she had fallen a lot of Dao Realm, and the strength under her command had been greatly reduced, and it would be more difficult to compete for resources in the future.

When all the people who should have come came, they found that there were twenty-one missing Dao realms.

"The loss is too great!"

Miao An said angrily.

And the other side.

Mingya is in a good mood, although she didn't let Miao'an's troops be wiped out, but she also suffered heavy losses!

That's enough!

......

In the following days, Ye Tian's other copy bodies continued to roam in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, but they often encountered danger, so they were directly killed.

However, he also approached the depths of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm step by step.

Here, it is unlikely that he will encounter those Supreme Dao Realms of Taisu Palace, after all, this place is too dangerous, if a large number of Supreme Dao Realms come here, they will inevitably suffer heavy losses, or even be wiped out.

"There is no Taisu Palace to Dao Realm here, I can directly copy the real body and copy the body, and I won't be discovered by them!"

Ye Tian decided.
